normalization.notes: Store encoded Brahmi in NFC and preserve transliteration, inscription source, and uncertain readings. Do not normalize Brahmi into Devanagari or Latin transliteration.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Brahmi consonant bases, independent vowels, vowel signs, anusvara, virama, akshara chunks, and transliteration labels
segmentation.notes: Brahmi is an early abugida with inscriptional variation. Count both encoded clusters and teachable akshara parts and keep Prakrit versus Sanskrit language scope explicit.

sources.notes: Encoded Brahmi characters and combining marks for inventory and rendering checks.

sources.notes: South Asian inscription context and bibliography for discovery only.
